title: Regroup whole numbers
description: Regroup numbers in each place value (e.g., regroup 1 ten as 10 ones) to express whole numbers in different ways.

assessment_items.question_content:
**Regroup to express the number in a different way.**

 |  | | | | |
- | :- | :-| :-| :-
$9{,}150$ | $=$ | $9 \text{ thousands}$ | $+$| $1\text{ hundred}$ | $+$| $5 \text{ tens}$
$9{,}150$ | $=$ | $8 \text{ thousands}$ | $+$| [[Ōśā dropdown 2]]  | $+$| $5 \text{ tens}$
hints:
$\green{9}{,}150$ is composed of:  
$\green{9 \text{ thousands}} + 1  \text{ hundred} + 5 \text{ tens}$.  

 We can use place value to express this in a different way.

$\green{9 \text{ thousands}}$ can be written as $\blue{8 \text{ thousands} + 1 \text{ thousand}}$.  

So, $\green{9 \text{ thousands}} + 1 \text{ hundred}$ can be regrouped this way:  

$\green{9 \text{ thousands}} + 1 \text{ hundred}$  
$\begin{align}
&=\blue{8 \text{ thousands} + 1 \text{ thousand}} + 1 \text{ hundred}\\
&= 8 \text{ thousands} + 10 \text{ hundreds} + 1 \text{ hundred}\\
&= 8 \text{ thousands} + \purple{11} \text{ hundreds}.\end{align}$

The other digit will not change.

|  | | | | |
- | :- | :-| :-| :-
$9{,}150$ | $=$ | $9 \text{ thousands}$ | $+$| $1\text{ hundred}$ | $+$| $5 \text{ tens}$
$9{,}150$ | $=$ | $8 \text{ thousands}$ | $+$|$\maroonD{11\text{ hundreds}}$  | $+$| $5 \text{ tens}$

assessment_items.question_content:
**Regroup to express the number in a different way.**

 |  | | | | | | |
- | :- | :-| :-| :-| :- | :-
$16{,}590$ | $=$ | $1\text{ ten thousand}$ | $+$| $6\text{ thousands}$ | $+$| $5\text{ hundreds}$ | $+$| $9\text{ tens}$
$16{,}590$ | $=$ | $1\text{ ten thousand}$ | $+$ | $6 \text{ thousands}$ | $+$|  $4\text{ hundreds}$ | $+$| [[Ōśā dropdown 1]]
hints:
$16{,} \green{5}90$ is composed of:
$1 \text{ ten thousand} + 6 \text{ thousands} + \green{5\text{ hundreds}} + 9\text{ tens}$.  

 We can use place value to express this in a different way.

$\green{5\text{ hundreds}}$ can be written as $\blue{4\text{ hundreds} + 1\text{ hundred}}$.

So, $\green{5\text{ hundreds}} + 9\text{ tens}$ can be regrouped this way:  

$\green{5\text{ hundreds}} + 9 \text{ tens}$  
$\begin{align}&=\blue{4\text{ hundreds} + 1\text{ hundred}} + 9\text{ tens}\\
&= 4 \text{ hundreds} + 10 \text{ tens} + 9\text{ tens}\\
&= 4 \text{ hundreds} + \purple{19} \text{ tens}.
\end{align}$

The other digits will not change.

|  | | | | | | |
- | :- | :-| :-| :-| :- | :-
$16{,}590$ | $=$ | $1\text{ ten thousand}$ | $+$| $6\text{ thousands}$ | $+$| $5\text{ hundreds}$ | $+$| $9\text{ tens}$
$16{,}590$ | $=$ | $1\text{ ten thousand}$ | $+$ | $6 \text{ thousands}$ | $+$|  $4\text{ hundreds}$ | $+$| $\maroonD{19\text{ tens}}$

assessment_items.question_content:
**Regroup to express the number in a different way.**

 |  | | | | | | |
- | :- | :-| :-| :-| :- | :-
$71{,}830$ | $=$ | $7\text{ ten thousands}$ | $+$| $1\text{ thousand}$ | $+$| $8\text{ hundreds}$ | $+$| $3\text{ tens}$
$71{,}830$ | $=$ | $6\text{ ten thousands}$ | $+$ | [[Ōśā dropdown 2]] | $+$|  $8\text{ hundreds}$ | $+$| $3\text{ tens}$
hints:
$\green{7}1{,}830$ is composed of:  
$\green{7 \text{ ten thousands}} + 1 \text{ thousand} + 8  \text{ hundreds} + 3 \text{ tens}$.  

 We can use place value to express this in a different way.

$\green{7 \text{ ten thousands}}$ can be written as $\blue{6 \text{ ten thousands} + 1 \text{ ten thousand}}$.  

So, $\green{7 \text{ ten thousands}} + 1 \text{ thousand}$ can be regrouped this way:

$\green{7 \text{ ten thousands}} + 1 \text{ thousand}$  
$\begin{align}&=\blue{6 \text{ ten thousands} + 1 \text{ ten thousand}} + 1 \text{ thousand}\\
&= 6 \text{ ten thousands} + 10 \text{ thousands} + 1 \text{ thousand}\\
&= 6 \text{ ten thousands} + \purple{11} \text{ thousands}.
\end{align}$

The other digits will not change.

|  | | | | | | |
- | :- | :-| :-| :-| :- | :-
$71{,}830$ | $=$ | $7\text{ ten thousands}$ | $+$| $1\text{ thousand}$ | $+$| $8\text{ hundreds}$ | $+$| $3\text{ tens}$
$71{,}830$ | $=$ | $6\text{ ten thousands}$ | $+$ |$\maroonD{11\text{ thousands}}$ | $+$|  $8\text{ hundreds}$ | $+$| $3\text{ tens}$

assessment_items.question_content:
**Regroup to express the number in a different way.**

 |  | | | | | | |
- | :- | :-| :-| :-| :- | :-
$73{,}250$ | $=$ | $7\text{ ten thousands}$ | $+$| $3\text{ thousands}$ | $+$| $2\text{ hundreds}$ | $+$| $5\text{ tens}$
$73{,}250$ | $=$ | $7\text{ ten thousands}$ | $+$ | $3\text{ thousands}$ | $+$|  $1\text{ hundred}$ | $+$| [[Ōśā dropdown 1]]
hints:
$73{,}\green{2}50$ is composed of:  
$7 \text{ ten thousands} + 3 \text{ thousands} + \green{2\text{ hundreds}} + 5\text{ tens}$.  

 We can use place value to express this in a different way.

$\green{2\text{ hundreds}}$ can be written as $\blue{1\text{ hundred} + 1\text{ hundred}}$.

So, $\green{2\text{ hundreds}} + 5\text{ tens}$ can be regrouped this way:  

$\begin{align}\green{2\text{ hundreds}} + 5 \text{ tens}&=\blue{1\text{ hundred} + 1\text{ hundred}} + 5 \text{ tens}\\
&= 1 \text{ hundred} + 10 \text{ tens} + 5 \text{ tens}\\
&= 1 \text{ hundred} + \purple{15} \text{ tens}.\end{align}$

The other digits will not change.

|  | | | | | | |
- | :- | :-| :-| :-| :- | :-
$73{,}250$ | $=$ | $7\text{ ten thousands}$ | $+$| $3\text{ thousands}$ | $+$| $2\text{ hundreds}$ | $+$| $5\text{ tens}$
$73{,}250$ | $=$ | $7\text{ ten thousands}$ | $+$ | $3\text{ thousands}$ | $+$|  $1\text{ hundred}$ | $+$|$\maroonD{15\text{ tens}}$

assessment_items.question_content:
**Regroup to express the number in a different way.**

 | | | | | | | |
- | :- | :-| :-| :-| :- | :-
$57{,}270$ | $=$ | $5\text{ ten thousands}$ | $+$| $7\text{ thousands}$ | $+$| $2\text{ hundreds}$ | $+$| $7\text{ tens}$
$57{,}270$ | $=$ | $4\text{ ten thousands}$ | $+$ | [[Ōśā dropdown 2]] | $+$|  $2\text{ hundreds}$ | $+$| $7\text{ tens}$
hints:
$\green{5}7{,}270$ is composed of:  
$\green{5 \text{ ten thousands}} + 7 \text{ thousands} + 2\text{ hundreds} + 7\text{ tens}$.  

 We can use place value to express this in a different way.

$\green{5 \text{ ten thousands}}$ can be written as $\blue{4\text{ ten thousands} + 1\text{ ten thousand}}$.

So, $\green{5 \text{ ten thousands}} + 7\text{ thousands}$ can be regrouped this way:  

$\green{5 \text{ ten thousands}} + 7 \text{ thousands}$
$\begin{align}&=\blue{4\text{ ten thousands} + 1\text{ ten thousand}} + 7 \text{ thousands}\\
&= 4 \text{ ten thousands} + 10 \text{ thousands} + 7 \text{ thousands}\\
&= 4 \text{ ten thousands} + \purple{17} \text{ thousands}.
\end{align}$

The other digits will not change.

| | | | | | | |
- | :- | :-| :-| :-| :- | :-
$57{,}270$ | $=$ | $5\text{ ten thousands}$ | $+$| $7\text{ thousands}$ | $+$| $2\text{ hundreds}$ | $+$| $7\text{ tens}$
$57{,}270$ | $=$ | $4\text{ ten thousands}$ | $+$ | $\maroonD{17\text{ thousands}}$| $+$|  $2\text{ hundreds}$ | $+$| $7\text{ tens}$

assessment_items.question_content:
**Regroup to express the number in a different way.**

 |  | | | | |
- | :- | :-| :-| :-
$4{,}570$ | $=$ | $4 \text{ thousands}$ | $+$| $5\text{ hundreds}$ | $+$| $7 \text{ tens}$
$4{,}570$ | $=$ | $3 \text{ thousands}$ | $+$| [[Ōśā dropdown 1]]  | $+$| $7 \text{ tens}$
hints:
$\green{4}{,}570$ is composed of:  
$\green{4 \text{ thousands}} + 5 \text{ hundreds} + 7 \text{ tens}$.  

 We can use place value to express this in a different way.

$\green{4 \text{ thousands}}$ can be written as $\blue{3 \text{ thousands} + 1 \text{ thousand}}$.  

So, $\green{4 \text{ thousands}} + 5 \text{ hundreds}$ can be regrouped this way:  

$\green{4 \text{ thousands}} + 5 \text{ hundreds}$  
$\begin{align}&=\blue{3 \text{ thousands} + 1 \text{ thousand}} + 5 \text{ hundreds}\\
&= 3 \text{ thousands} + 10 \text{ hundreds} + 5 \text{ hundreds}\\
&= 3 \text{ thousands} + \purple{15} \text{ hundreds}.\end{align}$

The other digits will not change.

|  | | | | |
- | :- | :-| :-| :-
$4{,}570$ | $=$ | $4 \text{ thousands}$ | $+$| $5\text{ hundreds}$ | $+$| $7 \text{ tens}$
$4{,}570$ | $=$ | $3 \text{ thousands}$ | $+$| $\maroonD{15\text{ hundreds}}$ | $+$| $7 \text{ tens}$

assessment_items.question_content:
**Regroup the number to express the value in a different way.**

$4$ thousands $=$ [[Ōśā numeric-input 1]] hundreds
hints:
$1\text{ thousand}= 10\text{ hundreds}$

[[Ōśā image 1]]

[[Ōśā image 2]]
So, $\blueD4\text{ thousands}= \blueD4\times 10\text{ hundreds}$.
$4\text{ thousands}= 40\text{ hundreds}$

$20$ hundreds $=$ [[Ōśā numeric-input 1]] thousands

assessment_items.question_content:
$1{,}900$ is $1$ thousand plus $9$ hundreds.

[[Ōśā image 1]]

**Which is another way to make $1{,}900$?**

[[Ōśā radio 1]]
hints:
We can break up the thousand into $\greenD{10 \text{ hundreds}}$.

[[Ōśā image 1]]

[[Ōśā image 2]]

This leaves us with $\blueD{9\text{ hundreds}}$. Plus we have the $\greenD{10 \text{ hundreds}}$ we just broke up.

[[Ōśā image 1]]

[[Ōśā image 2]]
$1{,}900$ can also be made with $19$ hundreds.

options.alt: One thousands block and 9 hundreds blocks.
